name: National Atomic Company Kazatomprom JSC
content: National Atomic Company Kazatomprom JSC is the world's largest producer of natural uranium, accounting for approximately 20% of global primary uranium production. As the national operator of the Republic of Kazakhstan for the import and export of uranium, rare metals, and nuclear fuel for nuclear power plants, the company operates through its subsidiaries, affiliates, and joint ventures. Kazatomprom utilizes low-cost in-situ recovery (ISR) mining technology across all its mining operations, maintaining a leading position in the nuclear fuel cycle and contributing significantly to the global transition toward clean energy.
